name: Drag Race Belgium
overview: For the first time in its herstory, Belgium is welcoming the most glamorous drag competition. Hosted by the great French-Canadian diva, Rita Baga, Drag Race Belgique will demonstrate the immense talent and creativity of its drag scene. So be prepared for their audacity and authenticity!

trailers.title: Meet The Queens of Drag Race Belgique! 🇧🇪 #DragRaceBelgique
